positive: A central, symmetrical composition featuring a mystical bioluminescent forest grove. Giant, stylized flora with fractal patterns and glowing edges meet a shimmering, cosmic portal in the background. The primary color palette is deep sapphire, neon teal, emerald green, and striking violet, emphasized by stark black silhouettes of the foliage. Use a linocut style mixed with glowing ethereal ink effects. Highly detailed, clean vector lines, strong contrast against a dark background, perfect for apparel printing, cinematic lighting, UHD, intricate symmetry, centered composition.
